Advice: If possible place input 0 in L1 (currently in DEV_0_DRAM_INTERLEAVED) • Output subblock 1x1 is small, try out_subblock_h * out_subblock_w >= 2 if possible • HiFi2 is sufficient for BFP8 multiplication and has 2x the throughput of HiFi4
Use HiFi2 or HiFi4 with BF16 activations for improved accuracy
